sources.exact_document_title: WHO guideline for screening and treatment of cervical pre-cancer lesions for cervical cancer prevention, second edition
sources.jurisdiction: International WHO guidance requiring national programme adaptation
sources.population: General population of women and women living with HIV within programme-defined cervical screening ages and pathways.
sources.clinical_setting: Organised cervical screening, triage, treatment and follow-up programmes.
sources.applicability_note: Exact for documenting an identified screening test, result, programme population, triage or follow-up already selected by a clinician or programme. It does not infer a result, diagnosis, treatment or UAE interval.

exact_sections.heading: Scope, populations and screen-and-treat pathways
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Defines programme population, HPV-based screening, triage and screen-triage-treat pathways with different considerations for women living with HIV.

exact_sections.heading: Recommendations for HPV-positive triage and treatment eligibility
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documenting an entered HPV or triage result and clinician-selected next pathway while preserving age, HIV, test and programme qualifiers.

exact_sections.heading: Follow-up after treatment of cervical precancer
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports recording treatment history and programme-directed follow-up already arranged; it does not create an interval or claim that colposcopy occurred.
